known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Genetic Algorithm + Local Search
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Genetic algorithm for global search combined with local search heuristics (2-opt, 3-opt)
key_papers: Grefenstette, J.J., et al. (1985). Genetic Algorithms for the Traveling Salesman Problem
Larrañaga, P., et al. (1999). A review on genetic algorithms for the traveling salesman problem
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.performance_notes: Common hybrid approach, well-documented in literature

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Ant Colony Optimization + 2-opt/3-opt
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Ant colony optimization metaheuristic with local search improvement
key_papers: Dorigo, M., & Gambardella, L.M. (1997). Ant colony system: A cooperative learning approach to the traveling salesman problem
Stützle, T., & Hoos, H.H. (2000). MAX-MIN Ant System
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.performance_notes: Standard hybrid approach in swarm intelligence literature

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Simulated Annealing + Local Search
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Simulated annealing with embedded local search heuristics
key_papers: Kirkpatrick, S., et al. (1983). Optimization by simulated annealing
Johnson, D.S., et al. (1991). Optimization by simulated annealing: An experimental evaluation

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Tabu Search + Adaptive Memory
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Tabu search with adaptive memory programming

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Christofides + Local Search Variants
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Christofides algorithm combined with various local search improvements
key_papers: Christofides, N. (1976). Worst-case analysis of a new heuristic for the travelling salesman problem
Johnson, D.S., & McGeoch, L.A. (1997). The traveling salesman problem: A case study in local optimization
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.performance_notes: Standard approach - Christofides with 2-opt/3-opt is baseline

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Lin-Kernighan Heuristic Variants
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Lin-Kernighan and its numerous variants (LK-H, LK-opt)
key_papers: Lin, S., & Kernighan, B.W. (1973). An effective heuristic algorithm for the traveling-salesman problem
Helsgaun, K. (2000). An effective implementation of the Lin-Kernighan traveling salesman heuristic
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.performance_notes: State-of-the-art for TSP, many hybrid variants exist

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Neural Network + Local Search
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: Neural network approaches combined with traditional heuristics
key_papers: Hopfield, J.J., & Tank, D.W. (1985). 'Neural' computation of decisions in optimization problems
Smith, K.A. (1999). Neural networks for combinatorial optimization: A review of more than a decade of research
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.performance_notes: Less common but documented in literature

known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.name: Particle Swarm Optimization + Local Search
known_hybrid_tsp_approaches.description: PSO combined with local improvement heuristics
key_papers: Kennedy, J., & Eberhart, R. (1995). Particle swarm optimization
